name: pcap-hunter
desc: PCAP Hunter is an AI threat hunting workbench. It uses Zeek and Tshark to analyze PCAPs, enriched by OSINT. Features include a world map, JA3 forensics, and C2…
descFull: PCAP Hunter is an AI threat hunting workbench. It uses Zeek and Tshark to analyze PCAPs, enriched by OSINT. Features include a world map, JA3 forensics, and C2 detection. It generates multi-language security reports via local or cloud LLMs, prioritizing privacy and speed.
